fields.definition: the headline reason for the ED visit (e.g., 'cough and trouble breathing')
when the symptoms began (time, days/hours)
anatomical location of the symptom (e.g., 'right side of chest')
the character/quality of the symptom (e.g., productive cough, sharp pain, burning)
qualitative severity of the symptom (mild/moderate/severe), excluding numeric pain rating
constant vs intermittent, frequency, duration of episodes
whether the symptom spreads to other areas
anything that makes the symptom better
anything that makes the symptom worse
additional positive symptoms beyond the chief complaint (e.g., fever, chills, nausea)
symptoms the patient explicitly DENIES having (pertinent negatives)
a numeric pain rating on a 0-10 scale
any current or recent medication, prescription or OTC
drug, food, or environmental allergies
prior diagnoses, chronic conditions, surgeries, hospitalizations, medical devices
family history of disease
tobacco / smoking status
alcohol use
illicit / recreational drug use
occupation, work situation, or living situation
